heuristics.name: Match between system and real world
Help users recognize, diagnose, and recover from errors

wcag_violations.description: Insufficient color contrast between text and background. It is difficult to read the text, especially for users with low vision.
wcag_violations.impact: Users with low vision cannot read the text.
wcag_violations.element: Email, Password, Login, Or login with, Google, Facebook, GitHub, Haven't Joined Us yet? Please Register
wcag_violations.recommendation: Increase the contrast ratio between the text and background to meet WCAG 2.1 AA requirements (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text).

hypothesis_list.hypothesis: Users will have difficulty reading the text due to low color contrast and may abandon the page because of it.
